name: Ninjitsu Art Tool - Iron Digger
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぽう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>具</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鉄土竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かなむぐら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: The equipped monster gains 500 ATK, also it is treated as a "Ninja" monster. You can only use each of the following effects of "Ninjitsu Art Tool - Iron Digger" once per turn. You can banish 1 "Ninja" monster from your GY, then target 1 card on the field; destroy it. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can target 1 of your banished "Ninja" monsters; add it to your hand or Special Summon it in face-down Defense Position.
eff: The equipped monster gains 500 ATK, also it is treated as a "Ninja" monster. You can only use each of the following effects of "Ninjitsu Art Tool - Iron Digger" once per turn. You can banish 1 "Ninja" monster from your GY, then target 1 card on the field; destroy it. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can target 1 of your banished "Ninja" monsters; add it to your hand or Special Summon it in face-down Defense Position.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
